prompt: Create a premium vertical 9:16 anime-style portrait of Tsuki, a beautiful young woman standing in a traditional Japanese wind chime market or shrine corridor during summer. She has deep tan skin, very long flowing pastel pink hair, vivid magenta-pink eyes, a soft confident smile, and elegant feminine features. She wears an ornate dark purple-black floral kimono with translucent wide sleeves, pink cherry blossom patterns, subtle gold linework, purple trim, and a white inner collar. Add a luxurious black obi belt with gold cords, pearl strands, purple tassels, and a decorative knot at the waist. Include one large purple-and-gold floral hair ornament on the right side of her head, with dangling beads and purple tassels, plus matching long earrings. Pose her waist-up to mid-thigh, slightly turned toward the viewer, with one raised hand gently touching or pointing at a blue glass wind chime on the left foreground. Surround her with many hanging glass furin wind chimes in the background and foreground, each with colorful rectangular paper strips; visible designs include blue, clear, pink, and multicolored glass bells with painted cherry blossoms and floral motifs. Set the scene under a wooden roof with warm beams, shelves of glass ornaments in the distance, greenery and sunlight outside, and strong summer backlighting creating glowing rim light through her hair. Use cinematic depth of field, sparkling glass reflections, bokeh highlights, sun-dappled shadows on the walkway, rich jewel-tone colors, ultra-detailed anime rendering, polished character design, delicate fabric texture, glossy glass, and a premium illustration finish. Keep the character consistent and central, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a premium vertical 9:16 anime-style portrait of Tsuki, a beautiful young woman standing in a traditional Japanese wind chime market or shrine corridor during summer. She has deep tan skin, very long flowing pastel pink hair, vivid magenta-pink eyes, a soft confident smile, and elegant feminine features. She wears an ornate dark purple-black floral kimono with translucent wide sleeves, pink cherry blossom patterns, subtle gold linework, purple trim, and a white inner collar. Add a luxurious black obi belt with gold cords, pearl strands, purple tassels, and a decorative knot at the waist. Include one large purple-and-gold floral hair ornament on the right side of her head, with dangling beads and purple tassels, plus matching long earrings. Pose her waist-up to mid-thigh, slightly turned toward the viewer, with one raised hand gently touching or pointing at a blue glass wind chime on the left foreground. Surround her with many hanging glass furin wind chimes in the background and foreground, each with colorful rectangular paper strips; visible designs include blue, clear, pink, and multicolored glass bells with painted cherry blossoms and floral motifs. Set the scene under a wooden roof with warm beams, shelves of glass ornaments in the distance, greenery and sunlight outside, and strong summer backlighting creating glowing rim light through her hair. promptZh: 创作一张 9:16 的优质竖版动漫风格肖像，主角是 Tsuki，一位美丽的年轻女性，正站在夏季传统的日本风铃集市或神社走廊中。她拥有深邃的古铜色皮肤、一头飘逸的 柔粉色长发、明亮的洋红色双眼、自信温柔的微笑以及优雅的女性化面部特征。她身穿一件华丽的深紫黑色花卉和服，配有半透明的宽袖、粉色樱花图案、精致的金线勾勒、紫色镶边以及白色内领。腰间系着奢华的黑色腰带，装饰有金绳、珍珠串、紫色流苏和装饰性结扣。她的右侧头部佩戴着一件大型紫金花卉发饰，带有垂坠的珠子和紫色流苏，并配有同款长耳环。采用腰部至大腿中部的构图，身体微微转向观众，一只手抬起，轻轻触碰或指向左侧前景中的蓝色玻璃风铃。背景和前景环绕着许多悬挂的玻璃风铃（Furin），每个风铃都带有色彩鲜艳的长方形纸签；可见的设计包括蓝色、透明、粉色和多色的玻璃铃铛，上面绘有樱花和花卉图案。场景设定在带有温暖横梁的木质屋檐下，远处陈列着玻璃装饰品，外侧可见绿植与阳光，强烈的夏季逆光在她的发丝上营造出耀眼的轮廓光。采用电影级景深、闪烁的玻璃反射、虚化光斑、走廊上斑驳的阳光阴影、浓郁的宝石色调、超精细的动漫渲染、精致的角色设计、细腻的织物纹理、光亮的玻璃质感以及高级插画质感。保持角色一致并居中，无文字，无水印，无额外角色。
